doi:feeb33ad3e4440682a4d#has_part.doi:5e782e67e70d0b2a022a#label: Critical difference comparison of machine learning methods on the reduced PMLBmini dataset subset using AUC ranks.

doi:5e782e67e70d0b2a022a#executes.doi:abef9f1c0d48853f3e51#label: Dataset reduction and reduced critical difference diagram in walkthrough.ipynb
doi:5e782e67e70d0b2a022a#executes.doi:abef9f1c0d48853f3e51#is_implemented_:
results_long_reduced = DataFrame([String[], String[], Float64[]], names(results_long))
for datasets in datasets_reduced
    for dataset in datasets
        append!(results_long_reduced, results_long[results_long.dataset .== dataset, :])
    end
end

cdd_plot_reduced = CriticalDifferenceDiagrams.plot(
    results_long_reduced,
    :approach,
    :dataset,
    :auc,
    maximize_outcome=true
)

PGFPlots.save("plots/cdd_reduced.tex", cdd_plot_reduced)
